user.title: Tap Electric
user.description: Create an API app at web.tapelectric.app → Account → API management and paste the primary API key below.

data.charger_id: Charger ID (optional — limits scope to one charger)

advanced_ask.title: Enable advanced mode?
advanced_ask.description: Advanced mode is optional. It uses your Tap app login (email + password) to unlock live session energy and richer session metadata via Tap's management API. You can enable or disable this later in Options.

advanced_creds.title: Tap app credentials
advanced_creds.description: Tap will see this sign-in as coming from Home Assistant. Your password is NOT stored — only the refresh token that Tap issues us is kept.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate advanced mode
reauth_confirm.description: Advanced mode for {email} can no longer refresh its session. Enter the password again to restore live data.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Tap Electric API. Check the base URL.
error.invalid_email: That email address isn't registered with Tap.
error.user_disabled: This Tap account is disabled. Contact Tap support.
error.firebase_unknown: Firebase authentication failed. Check the logs for details.
error.account_discovery_failed: Signed in, but we couldn't determine which Tap account to use. Try again or contact support.

abort.already_configured: This API key is already configured.
abort.reauth_entry_missing: The integration this reauth applies to is no longer configured.

general.title: General settings
general.description: Tune polling, freshness, and rendering. 'write_enabled' gates every write path (pause, resume, set limit, reset, push meter data) — flip it off to make the integration read-only.

advanced_menu.title: Advanced mode
advanced_menu.description: Advanced mode uses your Tap app login to enable live session energy and metadata. You can enable, update credentials, or disable it here.

advanced_creds.title: Tap app credentials
advanced_creds.description: Sign in with your Tap app email and password. The password is not stored — only the refresh token is kept.

error.invalid_email: That email address isn't registered with Tap.
error.user_disabled: This Tap account is disabled. Contact Tap support.
error.firebase_unknown: Firebase authentication failed. Check the logs for details.
error.account_discovery_failed: Signed in, but we couldn't determine which Tap account to use.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Tap Electric API.

auth_expired.title: Tap Electric API key rejected
auth_expired.description: The Tap Electric API returned 401 twice in a row. Your API key is probably expired or revoked. Create a new one at web.tapelectric.app → Account → API management and reconfigure the integration.

charger_offline.title: Tap charger offline
charger_offline.description: Charger {charger_id} hasn't reported back to Tap in over 24 hours. Likely causes: local network issue, power loss, or firmware crash. Check the charger's connectivity LED and power cycle if needed.

write_blocked.title: Tap Electric writes disabled
write_blocked.description: A write operation was requested but 'write_enabled' is off in the integration options. Toggle it back on under Settings → Devices & Services → Tap Electric → Configure.

pause_charging.name: Pause charging
pause_charging.description: Apply a 0A charging profile. The session continues; the car draws no power.

push_external_meter_data.name: Push external meter data
push_external_meter_data.description: Forward a reading from an external home energy meter to Tap's load balancing engine.
